scripts.typecheck: bun run api:codegen && bun run api:openapi && bun run --cwd packages/config typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/code typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/logging typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd services/notifications typecheck && bun run --cwd services/authz typecheck && bun run --cwd services/inference typecheck && bun run --cwd services/sessions typecheck && bun run --cwd services/agent typecheck && bun run --cwd services/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/api-client typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/lush typecheck && bun run --cwd services/docs typecheck
scripts.test:repo: bun run typecheck && bun build services/api/src/server.ts --target bun --outdir /tmp/lush-api-check && bun build services/agent/src/server.ts --target bun --outdir /tmp/lush-agent-check
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/lush bundle
